summary: Completed frontend testing for TAREA F1.1 + F1.2 - Day configuration and sticky summary features. All 10 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Comidas selector [3] [4] works - selecting 3 hides Comida 4
✅ Comidas selector - switching back to 4 shows Comida 4 again
✅ 'Cuándo entrenas' dropdown changes meal order (Intra/Post position)
✅ Peri 'Sin periworkout' hides both Intra and Post
✅ Rest day (Día de descanso) hides training selectors (Entrenas/Peri) and Intra/Post
✅ Sticky summary shows P/H/G progress bars with correct values
✅ Mini-meal status shows C1⚪ | Intra⚪ | Post⚪ etc based on configuration
✅ Click on sticky summary expands breakdown table with per-meal macros
✅ Progress bars inside meal cards show servido/objetivo (e.g., 47/45g)
✅ Meal status indicator changes (⚪ empty, 🟢 cuadrada, 🟡 falta, 🔴 sobra)
✅ ELIGE TU MENÚ button opens menu options modal with A/B/C options
✅ Applying menu option updates macros in meal and summary
✅ Macros recalculate correctly when configuration changes (3→4 comidas, peri options)

1_comidas_selector.details: 3/4 pills toggle. Selecting 3 hides Comida 4, selecting 4 shows it. Macros recalculate automatically.

2_cuando_entrenas_dropdown.details: Options: En ayunas, Después de Comida 1/2/3. Changes position of Intra/Post in meal accordion.

3_periworkout_dropdown.details: Options: Intra+Post, Solo Post, Solo Intra, Sin periworkout. Controls visibility of Intra/Post meals.

4_rest_day_mode.details: Día de descanso hides Entrenas/Peri selectors and Intra/Post meals. Only shows regular comidas.

5_sticky_summary.details: Shows P/H/G progress bars, Kcal, Peri line, and mini-meal status. Has z-index 30 below header.

6_mini_meal_status.details: Shows C1⚪ | Intra⚪ | Post⚪ etc. Updates dynamically based on meal content and status.

7_summary_expandable_table.details: Click expands table showing per-meal breakdown: Comida 1-4, Intra, Post, TOTAL, OBJETIVO rows.

8_meal_progress_bars.details: Inside each meal card: P/H/G bars showing servido/objetivo (e.g., 47/45g), checkmark when within margin.

9_meal_status_indicator.details: Shows status message: 🟢 Cuadrada (within margin), 🟡 Faltan Xg (under target), 🔴 Sobran Xg (over target).

10_elige_tu_menu_button.details: Opens modal with 3 menu options (A/B/C). Each shows ingredients and macros. 'Cuadrada' badge when balanced.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All F1.1 + F1.2 features verified working. ConfigSection with comidas/entrenas/peri selectors, DaySummary sticky component with expandable table, MealProgressBars with status indicators. ELIGE TU MENÚ button functional. Mobile navigation issue mentioned by main agent was not tested (desktop only).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested features working correctly. No bugs found.
